The **men's 50 metre backstroke** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 30 with the heats and the semifinals and July 31 with the final.
